_comment: Content-flag retry e2e (#881). Companion to image-seedream-content-retry.json for the motion path. ltx_2_3_pro is used ONLY by the content-retry spec. Attempt 0's submit returns a 422 content-checker rejection; the SAME-model reseeded retry (attempt 1) succeeds. The error is returned at SUBMIT (aimock's fal handler checks isErrorResponse before creating the queue job), so the submit-motion step catches it; polling reads the completed job from aimock's job map (no fixture consumed). The success video url is a real fal.media mp4 (reused from the recorded grok fixture) so uploadVideoToStorage can fetch real bytes into the local Miniflare R2, like the full-sequence spec.

error.message: The model did not generate the expected output for this prompt. It may contain unsafe content.
